---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(htmltools)
library(purrr)
```

::: {.hero-principal}

::: {.hero-contenido}

::: {.hero-texto}

# Benjamín Lang Bustos

<p class="hero-rol">Sociologist · Data Analyst · Researcher</p>

<p class="hero-descripcion">
<strong>6 years turning data into decisions</strong> across the public sector, private industry, and academia. Specialized in large-scale data processing and visualization with R, Python, and Power BI, with an analytical and strategic communication approach. Dashboards, automated reporting, and evidence-based KPI development.
</p>

<div class="hero-badges">
<span class="badge-item">R · Python · Power BI</span>
<span class="badge-item">R Markdown · Quarto</span>
<span class="badge-item">⚙️ Automation</span>
<span class="badge-item">🤖 Applied AI</span>
</div>

<div class="hero-botones">
<a href="about-en.html" class="btn-primario">View full CV →</a>
<a href="trabajos-en.html" class="btn-secundario">Work & projects</a>
<a href="mailto:benjalang1997@gmail.com" class="btn-ghost">✉️ Get in touch</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.hero-imagen}
![](img/perfil.jpg){.foto-hero fig-alt="Photo of Benjamín Lang"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
logos <- list(
  list(src = "img/portada/ine.png",        alt = "INE Censo 2024",  tipo = "wide"),
  list(src = "img/portada/cep.png",        alt = "CEP",             tipo = "wide"),
  list(src = "img/portada/santa_rosa.png", alt = "SLEP Santa Rosa", tipo = "wide"),
  list(src = "img/portada/c22.png",        alt = "C22",             tipo = "square"),
  list(src = "img/portada/tironi.png",     alt = "Tironi",          tipo = "square")
)

div(class = "hero-logos-foto",
  div(class = "hero-logos-foto-label", "Experience at"),
  div(class = "hero-logos-foto-row",
    map(logos, \(l)
      tags$img(
        src   = l$src,
        alt   = l$alt,
        class = paste("hero-logo-item", if (l$tipo == "square") "hero-logo-square" else "")
      )
    )
  )
)
```

:::

:::

::: {.hero-stats}

```{r}
#| echo: false
div(class = "stats-hero",
  div(class = "stat-hero-item",
    div(class = "stat-hero-numero", "6+"),
    div(class = "stat-hero-label", "Years of experience")),
  div(class = "stat-hero-item",
    div(class = "stat-hero-numero", "13"),
    div(class = "stat-hero-label", "Policy Papers")),
  div(class = "stat-hero-item",
    div(class = "stat-hero-numero", "4"),
    div(class = "stat-hero-label", "Sectors")),
  div(class = "stat-hero-item",
    div(class = "stat-hero-numero", "3"),
    div(class = "stat-hero-label", "Languages"))
)
```

:::

:::

## 🔬 Areas of Expertise {.seccion-titulo}

```{r}
#| echo: false
areas <- list(
  list(
    icono = "📊",
    titulo = "Data Science & Applied Statistics",
    desc = "Processing, validation, and statistical analysis of complex large-scale data. Building indicators, modeling, and visualization oriented toward decision-making. R, Python, and Power BI applied across the public, private, and academic sectors.",
    tags = c("R · advanced", "Python", "Power BI")
  ),
  list(
    icono = "🏛️",
    titulo = "Data Governance in Organizations",
    desc = "Design and implementation of institutional data ecosystems: from collection and validation to visualization and communication. Team collaboration through training, process automation, and generating transparency for evidence-based decisions.",
    tags = c("Dashboards", "Automation", "Training", "Transparency")
  ),
  list(
    icono = "🔬",
    titulo = "Research Methodologies & Techniques",
    desc = "Research project formulation and design for quantitative, qualitative, and mixed-methods approaches. Applying appropriate methodologies, instrument validation, critical literature review, and selection of optimal research strategies. Large-scale census and survey processing with quality assurance.",
    tags = c("Research design", "Validation", "Censuses & surveys", "Critical analysis")
  ),
  list(
    icono = "📋",
    titulo = "Strategic Reports",
    desc = "Preparation of reports and briefings for advisory and evidence-based decision-making. Applied research synthesis for public institutions, private organizations, and think tanks.",
    tags = c("Evidence", "Advisory", "Think tanks", "Reports")
  )
)

div(class = "grid",
  map(areas, \(a) {
    div(class = "g-col-12 g-col-md-6",
      div(class = "tarjeta",
        div(class = "tarjeta-icono", a$icono),
        tags$h3(a$titulo),
        tags$p(a$desc),
        div(class = "skill-tags",
          map(a$tags, \(t) span(class = "skill-tag", t))
        )
      )
    )
  })
)
```

## 💼 Featured Projects {.seccion-titulo}

```{r}
#| echo: false
proyectos <- list(
  list(
    tipo   = "Public sector",
    nombre = "Educational Data SLEP Santa Rosa",
    periodo = "2025 – present",
    desc   = "Systematization and visualization of educational indicators for regional public education using R and Power BI. Institutional data governance design and construction of a data processing and analysis ecosystem enabling clear, organized, and auditable reporting through R Markdown and Power BI.",
    link   = "https://sites.google.com/slepsantarosa.cl/datos-usointerno/inicio?authuser=2"
  ),
  list(
    tipo   = "Research",
    nombre = "Digital Humanities C22 — CEP",
    periodo = "2021 – 2024",
    desc   = "Computational analysis of the Chilean constitutional process. Text data processing and political visualization.",
    link   = "https://c22cepchile.cl/"
  ),
  list(
    tipo   = "Public statistics",
    nombre = "Population & Housing Census 2024",
    periodo = "2024 – 2025",
    desc   = "Senior Methodological Analyst at INE. Validation and quality assurance of census data at large scale. Preliminary data analysis, regional reports, and demographic analysis.",
    link   = "https://censo2024.ine.gob.cl/"
  ),
  list(
    tipo   = "Private sector",
    nombre = "Tironi & Associates",
    periodo = "2021 – 2023",
    desc   = "Strategic public affairs consulting. Constitutional bulletin 2022, political analysis, and strategic communications. Support on various consulting projects with emphasis on data analysis for organizational diagnosis and strategy.",
    link   = "https://tironi.cl/home"
  )
)

div(class = "grid",
  map(proyectos, \(p) {
    div(class = "g-col-12 g-col-md-6",
      div(class = "proyecto-card",
        div(class = "tarjeta-etiqueta", p$tipo),
        tags$h3(tags$a(href = p$link, target = "_blank", p$nombre)),
        div(class = "proyecto-periodo", p$periodo),
        tags$p(p$desc)
      )
    )
  })
)
```

<div class="text-center" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
<a href="trabajos-en.html" class="btn-secundario">View all work →</a>
</div>

## 🛠️ Services I Offer {.seccion-titulo}

```{r}
#| echo: false
servicios <- list(
  list(icono = "📊", titulo = "Data Analysis & Modeling",
       desc = "Data processing, cleaning, and statistical analysis with R, Python, and Power BI. KPI development and technical reports."),
  list(icono = "📈", titulo = "Dashboards & Executive Reports",
       desc = "Design of interactive dashboards and visual reports that transform complex data into clear information for decision making."),
  list(icono = "🏛️", titulo = "Organizational Data Governance",
       desc = "Design of data ecosystems: process standardization, automation, team training, and institutional transparency."),
  list(icono = "🗳️", titulo = "Political & Electoral Analysis",
       desc = "Electoral data, legislative tracking, public opinion indicators, and political trend monitoring."),
  list(icono = "🔬", titulo = "Applied Social Research",
       desc = "Quantitative, qualitative, or mixed research for organizational diagnosis, program evaluation, and context analysis."),
  list(icono = "🎓", titulo = "Data Training",
       desc = "Workshops on data analysis with R, Power BI, and quantitative methodology for research teams and institutions."),
  list(icono = "📝", titulo = "Social Survey Design",
       desc = "Design, validation, and piloting of quantitative measurement instruments. Questionnaire construction with validated scales, sampling strategies, and fieldwork planning."),
  list(icono = "🎯", titulo = "Evidence-Based Strategic Advisory",
       desc = "Technical support for decision-making processes in public and private institutions. Evidence synthesis, scenario analysis, and data-driven recommendations."),
  list(icono = "🔍", titulo = "Statistical Processing Review",
       desc = "Audit and validation of statistical analyses: database review, model assumption checks, result consistency, and identification of methodological errors.")
)

div(class = "grid",
  map(servicios, \(s) {
    div(class = "g-col-12 g-col-md-6 g-col-lg-4",
      div(class = "servicio-card",
        div(class = "icono", s$icono),
        tags$h3(s$titulo),
        tags$p(s$desc)
      )
    )
  })
)
```

<div class="text-center" style="margin-top:0.5rem;">
<a href="mailto:benjalang1997@gmail.com" class="btn-primario">✉️ Check availability</a>
</div>

## 📰 Latest Publication {.seccion-titulo}

::: {.pub-destacada}
**Frei, R., Cordero, R., Lang, B., Rozas, J., & Rodríguez, J. P.** (2024).
*"Claims of ownership, claims of dignity: Moral narratives on the right to housing in Chile's constitutional referendum"*.
**Journal of Language and Politics**, 23(5), 723–746.

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1075/jlp.24097.fre" class="btn-primario" target="_blank">Read article →</a>
<a href="publicaciones-en.html" class="btn-secundario">View all publications →</a>
:::
